personalProjects.name: Shagun AI Tutor
personalProjects.valueProposition: AI-assisted learning companion for structured, conversational tutoring.
personalProjects.problemSolved: Helps learners move from scattered questions to guided explanations and practice-oriented learning.
personalProjects.targetUsers: Students, self-learners, and professionals building conceptual clarity.

personalProjects.name: Excel Differential Tool
personalProjects.valueProposition: Fast comparison utility for identifying differences across Excel files.
personalProjects.problemSolved: Reduces manual review effort when users need to compare spreadsheets and spot row or value changes.
personalProjects.targetUsers: Analysts, finance teams, operations users, and QA reviewers.

personalProjects.name: AI Career Copilot
personalProjects.valueProposition: AI-powered career analysis tool for resume and role-fit insights.
personalProjects.problemSolved: Helps candidates translate career history into clearer positioning for target opportunities.
personalProjects.targetUsers: Job seekers, career switchers, and professionals preparing for senior roles.

personalProjects.name: PromptCraft - AI Prompt Studio
personalProjects.valueProposition: Prompt optimization studio that turns rough ideas into high-quality AI prompts.
personalProjects.problemSolved: Reduces cognitive load and improves instruction clarity for users working with generative AI.
personalProjects.targetUsers: Professionals, creators, analysts, and AI productivity users.

personalProjects.name: Saarthi Yoga
personalProjects.valueProposition: Content-led wellness experience with structured discovery of yoga practices.
personalProjects.problemSolved: Makes yoga content easier to navigate, understand, and maintain through clean information architecture.
personalProjects.targetUsers: Wellness learners, yoga practitioners, and content-led community users.
